machine_start_gcode: PRINT_START TOOL={initial_tool} TOOLS=auto BED=[first_layer_bed_temperature] HOTEND={if initial_tool==0}{first_layer_temperature[0]}{else}{first_layer_temperature[1]}{endif} CHAMBER=[chamber_temperature] SOAK_MIN=5 PREHEAT=150 PROBE_COUNT=9,9 MARGIN=8 CONTACT=0 CONTACT_SAMPLES=3 FORCE_Z_TILT=0 TOTAL_LAYER_COUNT={total_layer_count} X0={first_layer_print_min[0]} Y0={first_layer_print_min[1]} X1={first_layer_print_max[0]} Y1={first_layer_print_max[1]}
